children.text: I'm a tradesman-turned-tech enthusiast with a background in mining, manufacturing, and mechanical systems. These days you'll usually find me running Linux, experimenting with self-hosted infrastructure, building projects to learn new skills, or diving into software development. I enjoy understanding how things work, whether that's heavy machinery underground, a Docker stack in my homelab, or the code behind a new application. This site is where I document what I'm learning, share projects I'm working on, and explore the intersection between practical engineering and modern technology.
